GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [i_category@0 ASC, i_class@1 ASC, i_brand@2 ASC, i_product_name@3 ASC, d_year@4 ASC, d_qoy@5 ASC, d_moy@6 ASC, s_store_id@7 ASC, sumsales@8 ASC, rk@9 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[i_category@0 ASC, i_class@1 ASC, i_brand@2 ASC, i_product_name@3 ASC, d_year@4 ASC, d_qoy@5 ASC, d_moy@6 ASC, s_store_id@7 ASC, sumsales@8 ASC, rk@9 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_category@0 as i_category, i_class@1 as i_class, i_brand@2 as i_brand, i_product_name@3 as i_product_name, d_year@4 as d_year, d_qoy@5 as d_qoy, d_moy@6 as d_moy, s_store_id@7 as s_store_id, sumsales@8 as sumsales, rank() PARTITION BY [dw1.i_category] ORDER BY [dw1.sumsales DESC NULLS FIRST] RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW@9 as rk]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
        GpuFilterExec: predicate=rank() PARTITION BY [dw1.i_category] ORDER BY [dw1.sumsales DESC NULLS FIRST] RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW@9 <= 100
          GpuWindowExec: wdw=[rank() PARTITION BY [dw1.i_category] ORDER BY [dw1.sumsales DESC NULLS FIRST] RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW]
            GpuSortExec: expr=[i_category@0 ASC NULLS LAST, sumsales@8 DESC]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_category@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[i_category@0 as i_category, i_class@1 as i_class, i_brand@2 as i_brand, i_product_name@3 as i_product_name, d_year@4 as d_year, d_qoy@5 as d_qoy, d_moy@6 as d_moy, s_store_id@7 as s_store_id, sum(coalesce(store_sales.ss_sales_price * store_sales.ss_quantity,Int64(0)))@9 as sumsales]
                    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_category, i_class, i_brand, i_product_name, d_year, d_qoy, d_moy, s_store_id, __grouping_id], aggr=[sum(coalesce(store_sales.ss_sales_price * store_sales.ss_quantity,Int64(0)))]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_category@0, i_class@1, i_brand@2, i_product_name@3, d_year@4, d_qoy@5, d_moy@6, s_store_id@7, __grouping_id@8], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_category, i_class, i_brand, i_product_name, d_year, d_qoy, d_moy, s_store_id], aggr=[sum(coalesce(store_sales.ss_sales_price * store_sales.ss_quantity,Int64(0)))]
                            GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_quantity@4 as ss_quantity, ss_sales_price@5 as ss_sales_price, d_year@6 as d_year, d_moy@7 as d_moy, d_qoy@8 as d_qoy, s_store_id@9 as s_store_id, i_brand@0 as i_brand, i_class@1 as i_class, i_category@2 as i_category, i_product_name@3 as i_product_name]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, ss_item_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11]
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=5478274
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                      GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_item_sk@1 as ss_item_sk, ss_quantity@2 as ss_quantity, ss_sales_price@3 as ss_sales_price, d_year@4 as d_year, d_moy@5 as d_moy, d_qoy@6 as d_qoy, s_store_id@0 as s_store_id]
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_store_sk@0, ss_store_sk@1)], projection=[1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8]
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_store_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=1
                                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=5478274
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_store_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_item_sk@3 as ss_item_sk, ss_store_sk@4 as ss_store_sk, ss_quantity@5 as ss_quantity, ss_sales_price@6 as ss_sales_price, d_year@0 as d_year, d_moy@1 as d_moy, d_qoy@2 as d_qoy]
                                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8]
                                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=5478274
                                                            GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_month_seq@1 >= 1200 AND d_month_seq@1 <= 1211, projection=[0, 2, 3, 4]
                                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=5478274

                                                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

--- memory ---
